title: delphinium tricorne var. genuinum
intro: Delphinium tricorne var. genuinum, also known as the Three-flowered Delphinium, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, antitussive, and expectorant effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparation of Delphinium tricorne var. genuinum typically involves the roots and leaves being dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
